name: Terunyan to Amanoiwato
short_description: Terunyan to Amanoiwato is a rhythm game where Terunyan moves straight ahead, collecting elementals along the way. Time your actions to the beat and gather them more efficiently!
detailed_description:
The teru-teru bozu “Terunyan” loves The Sun.
Every day, she happily wanders around enjoying her favorite hobby: collecting elementals.

Terunyan to Amanoiwato is a rhythm game where Terunyan moves straight ahead while gathering elementals.
Time your actions to the beat and collect them more efficiently!

When elementals enter the judgment area, it’s your chance to collect them!
But be careful—if you fail, Terunyan’s motivation will drop, and the scenery will become covered in fog.
If her motivation reaches zero, Terunyan returns home, and it’s game over.

But don’t worry.
As Terunyan collects elementals, she builds up energy.
Use that energy to activate skills and blow away the fog created by mistakes!

supported_languages: English, Japanese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
